nodes.documentation: @title Minimal interface to interact with the existing ZombieOwnership ERC721 contract
nodes.name: ZombieOwnershipInterface
ZombieMarketplace

nodes.documentation: @dev Owner can update the underlying ZombieOwnership contract address if needed.
nodes.name: setZombieContract

nodes.documentation:
@dev List a zombie for sale. Caller must be the current owner and must have
     approved this marketplace contract to transfer the token.
nodes.name: listZombie

nodes.documentation: @dev Cancel an existing listing and return the zombie to the seller.
nodes.name: cancelListing

nodes.documentation: @dev Buy a listed zombie by paying the exact asking price in ETH.
nodes.name: buyZombie

buyZombie(uint256).details: Buy a listed zombie by paying the exact asking price in ETH.

cancelListing(uint256).details: Cancel an existing listing and return the zombie to the seller.

isOwner().return: true if `msg.sender` is the owner of the contract.

listZombie(uint256,uint256).details: List a zombie for sale. Caller must be the current owner and must have     approved this marketplace contract to transfer the token.

renounceOwnership().details: Allows the current owner to relinquish control of the contract.

setZombieContract(address).details: Owner can update the underlying ZombieOwnership contract address if needed.

transferOwnership(address).details: Allows the current owner to transfer control of the contract to a newOwner.

params.newOwner: The address to transfer ownership to.

renounceOwnership().notice: Renouncing to ownership will leave the contract without an owner. It will not be possible to call the functions with the `onlyOwner` modifier anymore.
